meta.source: PhilRice RSBSA / RCEF / Abonong Swak / Fertilizer Derby + philrice.json compatibility rankings

compatibility_sources.philrice: Rankings confirmed directly from philrice.json — use as primary source
compatibility_sources.derived: Rankings derived from Excel fertilizer effect descriptions — use as fallback until philrice.json is updated

environments.irrigated_lowland: Standard flooded paddy with controlled irrigation
environments.rainfed_lowland: Rain-dependent fields with intermittent drought risk
environments.saline: Salt-affected coastal or estuarine paddy soils

substitution_rules.description: When a seed is in shortage, apply these 4 filters in order to find the best substitute

filters.rule: Must match exactly — never substitute Hybrid with Inbred or vice versa
Must match exactly — never suggest a saline variety for an irrigated lowland farmer
Substitute maturity must be within ±10 days of the original to fit the same planting season
Among remaining candidates, rank by closest yield potential to the original as the tiebreaker

substitution_rules.fertilizer_shift_warning: After suggesting a substitute seed, compare the top 3 fertilizer_compatibility entries between the original and substitute. If they differ, notify the farmer that their fertilizer priority will change.

fertilizer_compatibility.reason: Boosts tiller count, leaf area index, and grain protein; applied at transplanting and 40 DAT

Strengthens culm and significantly improves blast and BLB disease resistance
N + S for grain protein; soil acidification improves nutrient availability in alkaline fields
Brassinosteroids improve pollen viability and filled spikelet ratio at tillering and PI
Rapidly corrects mid-season deficiency at PI stage via direct leaf absorption
Rapid cuticle penetration; enriches rhizosphere for improved hybrid rooting
Fixes 20-30 kg N/ha; slow organic N release matches vegetative demand
Activates rhizobacteria for better N and P solubilization; most indirect
Promotes vigorous vegetative growth; top-dress at 21 DAT and PI for max yield
All macro-nutrients from day 1; supports high early growth rate in hybrid
